description_long: This object is a small, futuristic airplane with a sleek, angular fuselage and a compact, aggressive profile. The main body is dark green, flanked by red wing structures that extend outward and slightly downward, giving it a dynamic, predatory appearance. The wings are mid-mounted and feature straight, narrow extensions with white cylindrical elements at the tips, possibly representing weaponry or advanced sensors. The nose is sharply pointed, and the rear features a prominent, elongated white element that could be an engine or exhaust. The cockpit area is integrated into the forward section of the fuselage, with no visible canopy or windows, suggesting a highly stylized or unmanned design. The overall construction appears to be solid and angular, with no visible landing gear or traditional tail surfaces.
description: A compact, angular airplane with a dark green fuselage, red mid-mounted wings, and white cylindrical extensions at the tips. The design is sleek and futuristic, with a pointed nose and integrated cockpit.
description_view_0: Front view shows the pointed nose, symmetrical red wings, and white cylindrical tips extending outward.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the flat, elongated fuselage, downward-angled wings, and the prominent white rear extension.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the wide stance of the wings, the central white rear element, and the angular body shape.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the same wing and fuselage configuration with visible white cylindrical tips.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with straight, narrow wings and downward-angled tips; no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_tail_design: No conventional tail; features a central rear extension in place of traditional vertical or horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-integrated cockpit with no visible canopy or windows, likely single-seat or unmanned.
